top_signals.title: U.S. renews Iran attacks as Trump vows to hit ’hard’
top_signals.summary: U.S. Central Command said American forces began "additional self-defense strikes" in Iran, in response to what it called Tehran's "unwarranted and continued aggression."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Every slice of China’s bond market has now succumbed to Japanisation
top_signals.summary: A scoop of belatedly spotting something and trying to make a thing of it
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
